message:
test: add 18 VT conformance golden test fixtures across 9 feature areas

Add structured JSON test fixtures for terminal emulator conformance
validation, covering edge cases that commonly cause bugs in VT
implementations.

Fixture categories:
- cursor: CUB clamps at col 0, CUF clamps at right margin, CUP random
  access write, CUU clamps at row 0, save/restore SGR attrs
- erase: ED-all then write, ED-below from middle
- line_edit: delete-line mid-screen, insert-line mid-screen
- modes: DECAWM re-enable wraps pending char
- scroll: multiple newlines scroll behavior
- scroll_region: scroll-down preserves outside, scroll-up preserves
  outside
- sgr: SGR reset blink attribute
- tab_stops: TBC clear-specific preserves others
- utf8: CJK mixed with ASCII handling
- wide_chars: overwrite wide char first half, overwrite wide char
  second half

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,32 @@
+{
+  "name": "cub_clamps_at_col0",
+  "description": "CUB does not wrap to previous line - clamps at column 0",
+  "initial_size": [
+    10,
+    3
+  ],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "4142431b5b3130304458",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": {
+      "row": 0,
+      "col": 1
+    },
+    "cells": [
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 0,
+        "char": "X"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 1,
+        "char": "B"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 2,
+        "char": "C"
+      }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,27 @@
+{
+  "name": "cuf_clamps_at_right_margin",
+  "description": "CUF clamps at last column - does not wrap to next line",
+  "initial_size": [
+    6,
+    3
+  ],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "411b5b3130304358",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": {
+      "row": 0,
+      "col": 5
+    },
+    "cells": [
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 0,
+        "char": "A"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 5,
+        "char": "X"
+      }
+    ]
+  }
+}

+      },
+      {
+        "row": 4,

+        "char": "X"

+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,42 @@

+  "name": "cjk_mixed_with_ascii",
+  "description": "Mix of CJK wide chars and ASCII narrow chars on same line",

@@ -0,0 +1,27 @@
+{
+  "name": "overwrite_wide_first_half",
+  "description": "Writing a narrow char over the first cell of a wide char clears both cells",
+  "initial_size": [
+    8,
+    3
+  ],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "e4b8961b5b313b314858",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": {
+      "row": 0,
+      "col": 1
+    },
+    "cells": [
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 0,
+        "char": "X"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 1,
+        "char": " "
+      }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,27 @@
+{

+  "description": "Writing a narrow char over the second cell of a wide char clears both cells",

+  "input_bytes_hex": "e4b8961b5b313b324859",
+  "expected": {

+        "char": " "
+      },
+      {

+        "col": 1,
+        "char": "Y"
+      }
+    ]
+  }
+}
